<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; use Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Recorders\QueryRecorder\QueryRecorder; class AddQueries { protected QueryRecorder $queryRecorder; public function __construct() { $this->queryRecorder = app(QueryRecorder::class); } public function handle(Report $report, $next) { $report->group('queries', $this->queryRecorder->getQueries()); return $next($report); } }
